scope: AgenC AskUserQuestion model-facing tool port and registry decomposition.

requiredBehaviors: each question requires question text, a short header, and 2-4 options
each option requires a label and description
option labels are unique within each question and question texts are unique
edgeCases: previews remain optional but do not replace required descriptions
answers and annotations are not exposed in the model input schema
malformed question and option payloads return tool errors

requiredBehaviors: the TUI approval projection records onAllow(updatedInput) by tool call id before resolving approval
the bridge passes the upstream AskUserQuestion tool object so PermissionRequest selects the structured question component
reject feedback for clarify and finish-plan-interview actions resolves through AskUserQuestion's model-facing continuation result
normal execution requires the TUI to record answers by call id before the tool returns a model-facing answer result
recorded answers are consumed once and formatted as question-to-answer pairs
annotations include selected preview text and user notes in the result text
special plan-interview actions return explicit continuation guidance
edgeCases: missing recorded answers produce a tool error instead of trusting model-supplied answers
empty call ids do not persist answer state
recorded answers are removed after consumption
recorded answers for one call id cannot be consumed by another call id

requiredBehaviors: AskUserQuestion remains registered in the built-in interaction surface
AskUserQuestion requires user interaction and is read-only
system tool exports remain compatible through a re-export shim
edgeCases: the tool stays distinct from request-user-input elicitation
plan-mode prompt text continues to reference AskUserQuestion for clarification only
